runtimeIntegration.notes: Must occur only after explicit authorization and must not enable protected systems.

stillRequired: production-consumable county asset placement after authorization

observationPeriod.duration: 7 calendar days minimum after implementation validation
observationPeriod.monitoring: daily operations and validation review with immediate escalation on protected-boundary or containment anomalies
successCriteria: all MODERATE defects accepted or resolved

minimumRemainingWork: Perform authorized runtime, registry, county-selection, and asset integration limited to Montgomery.
Run launch validation including containment, ownership, protected-boundary, rollback, and Liberty baseline checks.
Complete 7-day observation period with evidence and escalation review.
Obtain rollback and final launch decision acceptance.

dependencyRiskReview.reason: No Montgomery production launch authorization or release approval exists.
dependencyRiskReview.resolution: Record explicit production authorization with approver, scope, window, protected-boundary attestations, and go/no-go authority.

dependencyRiskReview.reason: Montgomery artifacts are package-scoped only and are not wired into runtime county package loading.
dependencyRiskReview.resolution: Integrate approved Montgomery county package using existing county-selection patterns without Supabase, historical, DriveTexas, Transportation Intelligence, or unrelated runtime changes.

dependencyRiskReview.reason: Existing registry artifact is not a production registry record.
dependencyRiskReview.resolution: Create production registry entry only after authorization; validate rollback removal/disable path.

dependencyRiskReview.reason: County selection, awareness scope, route-watch, alerts, and report ownership implications have not been production-validated for Montgomery.
dependencyRiskReview.resolution: Validate county selection resolves Montgomery only when selected and that awareness, alerts, route-watch, and reports remain county-contained.

dependencyRiskReview.reason: Montgomery assets are intentionally not placed in data/ and cannot be consumed by production paths.
dependencyRiskReview.resolution: Promote only approved Montgomery artifacts to production-consumable location after authorization; preserve package provenance.

dependencyRiskReview.reason: Pre-launch audits, containment checks, regression checks, and Liberty baseline comparisons have not been executed after runtime integration.
dependencyRiskReview.resolution: Run artifact, dependency, containment, regression, Liberty-baseline, protected-boundary, registry, and rollback validations after authorized integration.

dependencyRiskReview.reason: V580 observation plan exists but has not been executed.
dependencyRiskReview.resolution: Run a 7-calendar-day observation window after implementation validation, tracking protected boundaries, issue triage, containment, rollback triggers, and unauthorized mutation checks.

dependencyRiskReview.reason: Rollback is documented but not acceptance-signed for live launch state.
dependencyRiskReview.resolution: Desk-check or rehearse deactivation/removal path for registry/runtime changes and obtain owner acceptance before launch decision.
Create final launch decision record summarizing approvals, evidence, risks, rollback, and protected-boundary verification.

dependencyRiskReview.reason: V578/V579 historical observations may confuse reviewers although V581/V582 resolved current artifact presence.
dependencyRiskReview.resolution: Carry forward as resolved observation; do not rewrite prior artifacts unless separately requested.
